div.p: row1: "" { direction: right style.stroke: transparent style.fill: transparent

layer_protocol: { direction: down label: "PROTOCOL LAYER (protocol/)" style.fill: "#E8F4FD" style.stroke: "#2196F3" style.stroke-width: 2 # Message Types Enum msg_types: { shape: sql_table label: "MessageType (protocol/message.go) [M1-M4]" type: "MessageType | uint8" JOIN: "0x01 | Join cluster" LEAVE: "0x02 | Graceful leave" SYNC: "0x03 | Membership sync" ACK: "0x04 | Acknowledgment" GOSSIP: "0x10 | Push gossip [M2]" DIGEST_REQ: "0x20 | Anti-entropy [M3]" DIGEST_RESP: "0x21 | Digest response" STATE_REQ: "0x22 | State request" STATE_RESP: "0x23 | State response" PING: "0x30 | Direct probe [M4]" PING_REQ: "0x31 | Indirect probe" ACK_SWIM: "0x32 | SWIM ack" } # Wire Format Header header: { shape: sql_table label: "Header (protocol/message.go) [M1]" length: "uint32 | 4 bytes | total msg len" type: "MessageType | 1 byte | msg discriminator" node_id_len: "uint8 | 1 byte | sender ID length" node_id: "[]byte | variable | sender node ID" timestamp: "int64 | 8 bytes | Unix nanoseconds" total: "Total: 14 + node_id_len bytes" } # MemberEvent for Piggybacking member_event: { shape: sql_table label: "MemberEvent (protocol/member_event.go) [M4]" node_id_len: "uint8 | 1 byte" node_id: "string | variable" address_len: "uint8 | 1 byte" address: "string | variable" port: "uint16 | 2 bytes" state: "PeerState | 1 byte" incarnation: "uint64 | 8 bytes" timestamp: "int64 | 8 bytes" total: "Total: ~21 + var bytes" } }

layer_cache: { direction: down label: "CACHE & UTILITIES" style.fill: "#FFF3E0" style.stroke: "#FF9800" style.stroke-width: 2 seen_cache: { shape: class label: "SeenCache (cache/seen_cache.go) [M2]" -mu: "sync.Mutex" -capacity: "int" -entries: "map[uint64]*list.Element" -order: "*list.List" +Seen(id uint64): "bool" +Add(id uint64): "void" +Size(): "int" } piggyback: { shape: class label: "PiggybackBuffer (piggyback/buffer.go) [M4]" -mu: "sync.RWMutex" -events: "[]MemberEvent" -priority: "[]MemberEvent" -maxSize: "int" -seen: "map[string]uint64" +AddEvent(event MemberEvent): "void" +AddPriorityEvent(event MemberEvent): "void" +GetEvents(): "[]MemberEvent" +Size(): "int" } } }
row2: "" { direction: right style.stroke: transparent style.fill: transparent

layer_membership: { direction: down label: "MEMBERSHIP LAYER (membership/) [M1]" style.fill: "#E8F5E9" style.stroke: "#4CAF50" style.stroke-width: 2 peer_state: { shape: sql_table label: "PeerState (membership/peer.go)" ALIVE: "0 | Node healthy" SUSPECT: "1 | May be failing" DEAD: "2 | Confirmed dead" LEFT: "3 | Graceful leave" } peer: { shape: sql_table label: "struct Peer (membership/peer.go)" id: "string | UUID or configured" address: "string | IP or hostname" port: "int | UDP port" state: "PeerState | lifecycle state" incarnation: "uint64 | version counter" last_seen: "time.Time | last contact" state_changed: "time.Time | state transition" total: "Total: ~120 bytes" } peer_list: { shape: class label: "PeerList (membership/peer_list.go)" -mu: "sync.RWMutex" -peers: "map[string]*Peer" -selfID: "string" -deadTTL: "time.Duration" +AddPeer(peer *Peer): "bool" +GetPeer(id string): "*Peer, bool" +GetRandomPeers(k int): "[]*Peer" +UpdateLastSeen(id string): "bool" +SetState(id string, state PeerState, inc uint64): "bool" +RemovePeer(id string): "bool" +ReapDeadPeers(): "[]string" +CreateDigest(): "[]PeerDigest" "+MergeDigest(digest []PeerDigest)": "added, updated int" +Size(): "int" +AliveCount(): "int" } }

layer_state: { direction: down label: "STATE STORE (state/) [M2-M3]" style.fill: "#F3E5F5" style.stroke: "#9C27B0" style.stroke-width: 2 entry: { shape: sql_table label: "struct Entry (state/entry.go)" key: "string | application key" value: "[]byte | application data" version: "uint64 | Lamport clock" node_id: "string | origin node" updated_at: "time.Time | local debug" total: "Total: ~80 + value bytes" } store: { shape: class label: "Store (state/store.go)" -mu: "sync.RWMutex" -entries: "map[string]*Entry" -clock: "uint64" -nodeID: "string" -lastSent: "uint64" "+Set(key string, value []byte)": "uint64" +Get(key string): "*Entry, bool" +Apply(remote *Entry): "bool" +GetDelta(sinceVersion uint64): "[]*Entry" +GetAll(): "[]*Entry" +CreateDigest(): "map[string]uint64" "+GetEntries(keys []string)": "[]*Entry" +Clock(): "uint64" +Size(): "int" } } }
row3: "" { direction: right style.stroke: transparent style.fill: transparent

layer_gossip: { direction: down label: "PUSH GOSSIP (gossip/) [M2]" style.fill: "#FCE4EC" style.stroke: "#E91E63" style.stroke-width: 2 gossiper: { shape: class label: "Gossiper (gossip/gossiper.go)" -config: "GossipConfig" -nodeID: "string" -store: "*Store" -peerList: "*PeerList" -conn: "*net.UDPConn" -seenCache: "*SeenCache" -lastSent: "uint64" -done: "chan struct{}" +Start(): "void" +Stop(): "void" +HandleGossip(msg *Message, addr UDPAddr): "int, error" -gossipRound(): "void" -forwardGossip(body GossipBody): "void" } gossip_config: { shape: sql_table label: "GossipConfig (gossip/config.go)" fanout: "int | default 3" interval: "time.Duration | 200ms-1s" ttl_max: "uint8 | log_f(N)+2" seen_cache_size: "int | Nupdatesrounds" max_delta_size: "int | 64KB" } }

layer_antientropy: { direction: down label: "ANTI-ENTROPY (antientropy/) [M3]" style.fill: "#E0F2F1" style.stroke: "#009688" style.stroke-width: 2 antientropy: { shape: class label: "AntiEntropy (antientropy/antientropy.go)" -config: "AntiEntropyConfig" -nodeID: "string" -store: "*Store" -peerList: "*PeerList" -conn: "*net.UDPConn" -merkleTree: "*merkle.Tree" -merkleDirty: "atomic.Bool" -metrics: "*SyncMetrics" +Start(): "void" +Stop(): "void" +HandleDigestRequest(msg *Message, addr *UDPAddr): "error" +HandleStateResponse(msg *Message): "int, error" +GetMerkleTree(): "*Tree" } ae_config: { shape: sql_table label: "AntiEntropyConfig (antientropy/config.go)" interval: "time.Duration | default 10s" jitter_factor: "float64 | 0.1 (10%)" merkle_enabled: "bool | true" merkle_threshold: "int | 1000 keys" sync_timeout: "time.Duration | 30s" max_chunk_size: "int | 64KB" } lww_resolver: { shape: class label: "LWWResolver (conflict/lww.go)" -localNodeID: "string" +Resolve(local, remote *Entry): "*Entry" } } }

row4: "" { direction: right style.stroke: transparent style.fill: transparent layer_swim: { direction: down label: "SWIM FAILURE DETECTION (swim/) [M4]" style.fill: "#FFF8E1" style.stroke: "#FFC107" style.stroke-width: 2 fd: { shape: class label: "FailureDetector (swim/detector.go)" -config: "Config" -nodeID: "string" -incarnation: "uint64" -peerList: "*PeerList" -conn: "*net.UDPConn" -pendingPings: "sync.Map" -pendingPingReqs: "sync.Map" -suspicions: "sync.Map" -piggybackBuffer: "*PiggybackBuffer" -seqNum: "uint64" -metrics: "*Metrics" +Start(): "void" +Stop(): "void" +HandlePing(msg *Message, addr *UDPAddr): "void" +HandlePingReq(msg *Message, addr *UDPAddr): "void" +HandleAck(msg *Message): "void" +Incarnation(): "uint64" -protocolRound(): "void" -sendIndirectProbes(target *Peer): "bool" -markSuspect(nodeID string, inc uint64): "void" -markDead(nodeID string, inc uint64): "void" -refute(accusedInc uint64): "void" } swim_config: { shape: sql_table label: "Config (swim/config.go)" protocol_period: "time.Duration | 1s" ping_timeout: "time.Duration | 500ms" indirect_fanout: "int | 3" suspicion_timeout_mult: "int | 5" piggyback_size: "int | 10" } suspicion: { shape: class label: "Suspicion (swim/suspicion.go)" nodeID: "string" suspectTime: "time.Time" incarnation: "uint64" confirmations: "map[string]bool" timer: "*time.Timer" done: "chan struct{}" } } }

row5: "" { direction: right style.stroke: transparent style.fill: transparent layer_node: { direction: down label: "NODE (node/) [M1-M4]" style.fill: "#ECEFF1" style.stroke: "#607D8B" style.stroke-width: 2 node: { shape: class label: "Node (node/node.go)" -config: "Config" -store: "*Store" -peerList: "*PeerList" -gossiper: "*Gossiper" -antiEntropy: "*AntiEntropy" -failureDetector: "*FailureDetector" -conn: "*net.UDPConn" -metrics: "*BandwidthMetrics" -done: "chan struct{}" +Start(): "error" +Stop(): "error" "+Set(key string, value []byte)": "uint64" +Get(key string): "[]byte, bool" -receiveLoop(): "void" -handleMessage(msg *Message, addr *UDPAddr): "void" -joinCluster(): "error" } node_config: { shape: sql_table label: "Config (node/node.go)" node_id: "string | UUID or configured" address: "string | bind address" port: "int | UDP port" fanout: "int | default 3" gossip_interval: "time.Duration | 200ms" anti_entropy_interval: "time.Duration | 10s" protocol_period: "time.Duration | 1s" ping_timeout: "time.Duration | 500ms" seed_nodes: "[]string | bootstrap addrs" } } layer_test: { direction: down label: "TEST HARNESS (test/) [M5]" style.fill: "#FBE9E7" style.stroke: "#FF5722" style.stroke-width: 2 harness: { shape: class label: "Harness (test/harness.go)" -config: "HarnessConfig" -nodes: "[]*TestNode" -transport: "Transport" -metrics: "*MetricsCollector" -rng: "*rand.Rand" +Start(): "error" +Stop(): "void" +GetNode(index int): "*TestNode" +KillNode(index int): "error" +RestartNode(index int): "error" "+Partition(groups ...[]int)": "void" +Heal(): "void" +SetPacketLoss(rate float64): "void" } sim_transport: { shape: class label: "SimulatedTransport (test/simulated_transport.go)" -mu: "sync.RWMutex" -queues: "map[string]chan *envelope" -partitions: "map[string]map[string]bool" -packetLoss: "float64" -delay: "time.Duration" -rng: "*rand.Rand" "+Send(from, to string, data []byte)": "error" +Receive(ctx context.Context, nodeID string): "[]byte, string, error" "+Partition(groups ...[]string)": "void" +Heal(): "void" +SetPacketLoss(rate float64): "void" } } }
layer_protocol.msg_types -> layer_membership.peer_list: "JOIN/LEAVE/SYNC" layer_protocol.header -> layer_membership.peer_list: "NodeID lookup"
layer_membership.peer_list -> layer_gossip.gossiper: "GetRandomPeers(fanout)" layer_membership.peer -> layer_gossip.gossiper: "Address:Port | UDP target"
layer_state.store -> layer_gossip.gossiper: "GetDelta(lastSent)" layer_gossip.gossiper -> layer_state.store: "Apply(remote *Entry)"

layer_membership.peer_list -> layer_antientropy.antientropy: "GetRandomPeers(1)" layer_state.store -> layer_antientropy.antientropy: "CreateDigest()" layer_antientropy.antientropy -> layer_state.store: "Apply() | merge"
layer_membership.peer_list -> layer_swim.fd: "GetRandomPeers(1)" layer_swim.fd -> layer_membership.peer_list: "SetState(SUSPECT/DEAD)" layer_swim.fd -> layer_membership.peer_list: "UpdateLastSeen()"
layer_swim.fd -> layer_cache.piggyback: "AddEvent(MemberEvent)" layer_cache.piggyback -> layer_swim.fd: "GetEvents() | on ping/ack"
layer_gossip.gossiper -> layer_cache.seen_cache: "Seen(msgID)" layer_cache.seen_cache -> layer_gossip.gossiper: "bool | drop if true"

layer_node.node -> layer_membership.peer_list: "owns" layer_node.node -> layer_state.store: "owns" layer_node.node -> layer_gossip.gossiper: "owns" layer_node.node -> layer_antientropy.antientropy: "owns" layer_node.node -> layer_swim.fd: "owns"
layer_test.harness -> layer_node.node: "manages N instances" layer_test.sim_transport -> layer_node.node: "SimulatedTransport | UDP"

milestone_index: { shape: sql_table label: "Milestone Index" m1: "M1 | gossip-protocol-m1 | Bootstrapping & Peer Management" m2: "M2 | gossip-protocol-m2 | Push Gossip Dissemination" m3: "M3 | gossip-protocol-m3 | Pull Gossip & Anti-Entropy" m4: "M4 | gossip-protocol-m4 | SWIM-Style Failure Detection" m5: "M5 | gossip-protocol-m5 | Integration Testing & Convergence" }
